# Hockeycurve Template Gallery

A high-performance gallery of dynamic creative optimization (DCO) ad templates. 
Use this file to understand how to browse, analyze, and recommend templates to users.

## 🤖 AI Context & Recommendations
For AI agents (LLMs) performing template matching or recommendations, use the primary manifest below. It contains structured metadata optimized for token efficiency and reasoning.

- **Primary AI Manifest**: https://gallery2.hockeycurve.com/ai-manifest
- **JSON API Data**: https://selfserve.hockeycurve.com/public/hcgallery/markup

## Core Functionality
- **Browse**: View all templates at `/`.
- **Search**: Dynamic search available via `/search/[query]`.
- **Details**: Specific template logic and previews at `/template/[id]`.

## Template Taxonomy
When recommending templates, prioritize these metadata fields found in the AI Manifest:
- `usage_context`: Describes the technical trigger or consumer logic.
- `industry_fit`: Strategic categories (Automotive, E-commerce, etc.).
- `capabilities`: Technical features (Video, Geo-location, Countdowns).
- `performance_ctr`: Historical effectiveness tier.

## Navigation and URLs
- Home: `/`
- Template Details: `/template/[id]`
- Live Previews: Available on each template details page via an iframe.

## Technical Metadata
- framework: Next.js (App Router)
- Data Source: Hockeycurve Self-Serve V2 API
